_comment: PLACEHOLDER emission factors — REPLACE before production use. 'co2e_per_kg' values are representative cradle-to-retail midpoints in kg CO2e per kg of food, drawn from Poore & Nemecek (2018, Science) supplementary data. 'co2e_per_usd' values are rough spend-based (EEIO-style) fallbacks in kg CO2e per USD, used only when mass cannot be derived. These are to be superseded by GBD's Research Director / Jackie Bertoldo factors and the additional impact metrics (land, water, animal lives, health).
source: Poore & Nemecek (2018), Science 360(6392) — placeholder cradle-to-retail midpoints; spend-based fallbacks are EEIO-style estimates.
